text.title: How to spend 4 days in Lisbon 🇵🇹 | Itinerary #portugal #travelvlog #travel #adventure #lisbon
text.u: we spent 4 days in Lisbon and here's
what we recommend put on your walking
shoes and head to the historic
then get a pastel dinata at castros Walk
Off The Feast exploring the rest of the
town and enjoy sunset with a view
explore pink and green Street then grab
one of the best chocolate cakes in the
world after asleep in make your way to
kashai chill at the beach then explore
the town on your last day wake a little
earlier to beat the crowds cuz you're
going to CRA there are three big
attractions that can all be done in a
day but to pick one do the Quint Del
